zh.Ebersteinburg, Amt Baden, Baden, Germany: 巴登阿赤 巴登艾波斯坦波格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth von Eberstein於1114年出生在巴登阿赤 巴登艾波斯坦波格時，她的父親Graf Berthold III von Eberstein41歲，母親Adelheide von Calw37歲。她與Emich III von Leiningen結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1188年在德國海藍-普法爾茲海-斯盧可-可萊斯萊寧根享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth von Eberstein于1114年出生在巴登阿赤 巴登艾波斯坦波格时，她的父亲Graf Berthold III von Eberstein41岁，母亲Adelheide von Calw37岁。她与Emich III von Leiningen结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1188年在德国海藍-普法爾茲海-斯盧可-可萊斯萊寧根享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Eberstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German ober ‘upper’ + stein ‘rock, stone’, also ‘castle’, hence a habitational or topographic name from the place Idar-Oberstein in Rhineland-Palatinate with the latter part of the name taken from a rock above the town.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth von Eberstein was born in 1114, in Ebersteinburg, Amt Baden, Baden, her father, Graf Berthold III von Eberstein, was 41 and her mother, Adelheide von Calw, was 37. She married Emich III von Leiningen. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1188, in Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth von Eberstein est née en 1114, à Ebersteinburg, Amt Baden, Baden, son père, Graf Berthold III von Eberstein, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Adelheide von Calw, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Emich III von Leiningen. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1188, à Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth von Eberstein 1114 in Ebersteinburg, Amt Baden, Baden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Graf Berthold III von Eberstein 41 und ihre Mutter Adelheide von Calw 37. Sie hat Emich III von Leiningen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1188 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Eberstein è nata il nel 1114 nel Ebersteinburg, Amt Baden, Baden, sua padre, Graf Berthold III von Eberstein, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Adelheide von Calw, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Emich III von Leiningen. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1188, nel Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Ebersteinが1114年にバデンアムト バデンエバーステインブルグで生まれた時，父Graf Berthold III von Ebersteinは41歳，母Adelheide von Calwは37歳であった。Emich III von Leiningenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1188年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズルヘイン-ハンスルuク-クレイスレイニンジェンで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Eberstein(이)가 1114년 바든 아트 바든 에버스타인버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Berthold III von Eberstein(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheide von Calw(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 Emich III von Leiningen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1188년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 리이-헌스uck-크레이스 레이닝에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Eberstein nasceu em 1114, em Ebersteinburg, Amt Baden, Baden, seu pai, Graf Berthold III von Eberstein, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Adelheide von Calw, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Emich III von Leiningen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1188, em Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth von Eberstein родилась в 1114 г. в местности эбирстинбург, амт баден, баден, её отцу по имени Graf Berthold III von Eberstein было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Adelheide von Calw, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Emich III von Leiningen. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1188 г. в местности лининген, раин-хунсрuкк-крис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth von Eberstein nació en 1114, en Ebersteinburg, Amt Baden, Baden, su papá, Graf Berthold III von Eberstein, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Adelheide von Calw, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Emich III von Leiningen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1188, en Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 74 años.
